title: thelypteris longipes
intro: Thelypteris longipes, also known as the hanging fern, is a species of plant in the family Thelypteridaceae, commonly found in tropical and subtropical regions. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Thelypteris longipes include reducing stress and anxiety, improving respiratory problems, and enhancing immune function. In herbal preparations, the leaves of the plant are often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
